visual_description: A person in a blue jacket lies face down in deep snow near a frosted glass window, extending both hands forward as if trying to crawl out. The scene cuts to an indoor hallway where a man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a plaid shirt under a maroon jacket, smiles broadly and looks to his right. He then turns his head downward, his expression shifting as he looks away.
audio_description: A brief, light-hearted laugh is heard, followed by a quiet ambient background.
